meaning: 苏斯[突尼斯东北部港市]
examples: In Hammam Sousse, twelve public Spaces have been delegated for campaign posters.
Mr Bourguiba was demanding mass executions after bombings in the tourist resorts of Sousse and Monastir.
The stadiums in Sousse, Tunis and Rades, where the final will be played, are ready to go.
John Plummer, 37, from Norwich, was on holiday with his wife and two daughters in Skanes, between Sousse and Monastir.
